starter_events.purpose: The seeded starter dataset the journey discovers, projects, and writes from.

journey_projection.purpose: Typed transform between the Source and the managed-local-file Write in the golden journey.

lance_append_target.purpose: Pre-existing registerable Lance dataset so the append + idempotent-retry spot check runs on the managed-local-lance path.

checksum_encoding: sha256 of canonical JSON table.to_pydict(), sorted keys and compact separators
sanitization: Logical fixture values and counts only; no local paths, raw storage keys, tokens, or artifact URIs.
